params.name: Pardoned Turkey
params.description: The star of this Thanksgiving, a turkey by the name of Jack, stands nervously on the White House lawn. His turkey forerunners had claimed that great turkeys should rest in pieces on the Thanksgiving table. However, Jack's destiny was about to change. He will receive a pardon from the President, becoming an honorary turkey. For the rest of his life, he would enjoy endless grains and sunshine.
